procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1210
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1210 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1210 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1210'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1210 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

osquery.name: t1210_ssh_keys
osquery.query_text: SELECT uid, path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.ssh/%' LIMIT 50;

osquery.name: t1210_net_conn
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, local_address, local_port, remote_address, remote_port, state FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port IN (22, 135, 139, 445, 3389, 5985, 5986) AND state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 10 direct run(s), 7/7 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
